coverage_note: The bundled MC4R population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from MC4R melanocortin GPCR signaling, appetite suppression, energy balance, obesity biology, and receptor trafficking and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000166603: MC4R coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: MC4R findings should be read against melanocortin GPCR signaling, appetite suppression, energy balance, obesity biology, and receptor trafficking; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

rs17782313 (near MC4R obesity marker) is curated as a MC4R marker for Monogenic obesity review context, Appetite and energy-balance biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

MC4R loss-of-function model is curated as a MC4R marker for Monogenic obesity review context, Appetite and energy-balance biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
